title: Mystic Potions
body:
# Mystic Potions (Forge / Fabric / Quilt / NeoForge) ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/aa0ea0fd288d8bcf2e38a6aa9d7c75464456110a.png) ![Curseforge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/682855?logo=curseforge&logoColor=orange&label=Curseforge%20Downloads&color=orange) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/mysticpotions?logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth%20Downloads&color=lime) ![()](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge_%2F_NeoForge_%2F_Fabric_%2F_Quilt-1.19_--_1.19.1_--_1.19.2_--_1.19.3_--_1.19.4_--_1.20_--_1.20.1_--_1.20.2_--_1.20.4-blue?logo=forge&link=https%3A%2F%2Fmodrinth.com%2Fmod%2Fmysticpotions%2Fversions) ## **Mystic Potions** is being moved into my new mod, **Inspire** This project is **not being archived**—I’m keeping it available just in case I decide to update it again. That said, maintaining so many separate projects became very difficult, and I lost some motivation for a while. Recently, though, I’ve been working extremely hard to migrate everything into **INSPIRE**, along with many new ideas. One of my main goals with **Inspire** is **customization**. I know not everyone wants every feature a mod can add, so INSPIRE is being designed to be far more flexible and configurable. I don’t have a release date yet. Development is currently targeting newer versions, with support planned from **1.21.11 up to 1.26.1**. Progress will take time, but I also understand there’s still a huge community on **1.19.2**, **1.20.1**, and **1.21.1**, and I don’t want to leave you behind if I can help it. Now is the perfect time to share your ideas in the comments—**Inspire is being built for you**. > **PS:** I’ll still be a bit off the radar and may not respond directly to everyone, but I’m hoping to have someone post updates on Discord soon. --- ### Thank You ❤️ Thank you to everyone who supports my work by **downloading, liking, commenting, and donating**. I never thought I’d see the day where **Mystic Potions** and **Projectiles** combined would reach **462,000 downloads** across *Modrinth* and *CurseForge*. That’s absolutely crazy. Thank you all so much for the support. ### Wanna Support: [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I3I0QNFTK) ## About: - Adds New Potions And Effects To Minecraft & Makes Some Minecraft Potions Brewable! - Requires **Architectury Api** for respective versions. - Might be dropping Quilt support for 1.20.2+ until I get a better workflow, Fabric might work for quilt users but I havent tested. - Working on balancing with your feedback. - Always open to new ideas just ask on curseforge(No Promises). ### What they can be made into - **All Potions/Effects available in...** - Regular Potions - Splash Potions - Lingering Potions - Arrows ### Potions/Effects:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/24265cbcfb9dc73b2daf6db8b6ca8200dd9ae401.png) **Thunderous Potion**
- Instantly strikes lighting on Mobs/Players. - Brewed by putting a Lightning Rod on top of a Brewing Stand and Awkward Potions in the empty slots when the lightning rod is struck the Thunderous Potions will be created. - Thunderous Potion + Glowstone Dust = Strong Thunderous Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/c0abaedd4b8cfa7b587b0bd8eace718bde5599fa.png) **Explosive Potion**
- Instantly explodes Mobs/Players when used. - Awkward Potion + TNT = Explosive Potion - Explosive Potion + TNT = Strong Explosive Potion - Strong Explosive Potion + TNT = Extra Strong Explosive Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/671d6cae4c501c9088cfe10c079a9da50d2c5225.png) **Freezing Potion**
- Freezes Mobs/Players for the duration of the potion. - Awkward Potion + Powder Snow Bucket = Freezing Potion - Freezing Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Freezing Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/4d6f7b0ea984a7495ba4c624a69aada518ea5ff9.png) **Warming Potion**
- Keeps Mobs/Players safe from Freezing. - Hurts Snow Golems. - Freezing Potion + Blaze Powder = Warming Potion - Warming Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Warming Potion - Long Freezing Potion + Blaze Powder = Long Warming Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/a616575a3ef0487764480cdf58bf08e557d999c8.png) **Burning Potion**
- Burns any Mobs/Players for the duration of the potion. - Warming Potion + Blaze Powder = Burning Potion - Long Warming Potion + Blaze Powder = Long Burning Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/75ce5b6105950ce0b1c28bc4e7335bf86144a718.png) **Corrosive Potion**
- Destroys Metal Items in Mobs/Players (Anything crafted with Iron/Copper/Netherite) - Hurts Iron Golems. - Strong Poison Potion + Ghast Tear = Corrosive Potion - Corrosive Potion + Glowstone Dust = Strong Corrosive Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/35d40f431c4a697c64466bc93b7295c1b38d05e9.png) **Blindness Potion**
- Gives Players the Blindness Effect. - Night Vision Potion + Ink Sac = Blindness Potion - Long Night Vision Potion + Ink Sac = Long Blindness Potion - Night Vision Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Blindness Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/95dc80415e7896ad886af15ff5dbc9d99a7cfb90.png) **Darkness Potion**
- Gives Players the Darkness Effect. - Blindness Potion + Sculk = Darkness Potion - Long Blindness Potion + Sculk = Long Darkness Potion - Blindness Potion + Echo Shard = Darkness Potion - Long Blindness Potion + Echo Shard = Long Darkness Potion - Darkness Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Darkness Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/a929c45d7d74a1f563d9ecf56151eae109f35158.png) **Decay Potion**
- Gives Mobs/Players the Wither Effect. - Awkward Potion + Wither Rose = Decay Potion - Decay Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Decay Potion - Decay Potion + Glowstone Dust = Strong Decay Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/caf4c295483b270ad314eabdd81a5bc6d5e3986a.png) **Homing Potion**
- Teleports the Player to their bed. - Teleportation Potion + (Any Color Bed) = Homing Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/f64e37b6905f196db1b0e1c21c2285033ebd46bb.png) **Recovery Potion**
- Teleports the Player to their last Death Location. - Teleportation Potion + Recovery Compass = Recovery Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/a602119f1447de2d627024456d613856240291ce.png) **Teleportation Potion**
- Teleports affected randomly for the duration of the potion. - Awkward Potion + Chorus Fruit = Teleportation Potion - Teleportation Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Teleportation Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/d4b6773f84588eddfb99a962dcb65980a6cb1905.png) **Undying Potion**
- Keeps the Mobs/Players Affected from dying. - Awkward Potion + Totem of Undying = Undying Potion - Undying Potion + Redstone Dust = Undying Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/e8358d22823becca53fc5ae5cdd09877ed07c5ea.png) **Air Swim Potion**
- Players Can now Swim in the Air. - Hold CTRL + W to Swim - Hold Space for More Upwards Lift - Dolphins Grace Potion + Phantom Membrane = Air Swim Potion - Air Swim Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Air Swim Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/12559dad0d4a12fd394e8df5bfd8509ccd44d2c5.png) **Dolphins Grace Potion**
- Gives Players the Dolphins Grace Effect. - Awkward Potion + Redstone Dust = Dolphins Grace Potion - Dolphins Grace Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Dolphins Grace Potion - Dolphins Grace Potion + Glowstone Dust = Strong Dolphins Grace Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/2eee1120243661369ca54933c770ccbf8c70fb1b.png) **Levitation Potion**
- Gives Players the Levitation Effect. - Slow Falling Potion + Shulker Shell = Levitation Potion - Long Slow Falling Potion + Shulker Shell = Long Levitation Potion - Levitation Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Levitation Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/a62cd6d24c4e35a99285a7360b2b400a81a8def3.png) **Gravitation Potion**
- Gravity Flips when you crouch. - Levitation Potion + Nether Star = Gravitation Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/5f283552842995091072e5b356da2222f2468d52.png) **Slippery Potion**
- Mobs/Player Block Friction Reduced. - Awkward Potion + Blue Ice = Slippery Potion - Slippery Potion + Redstone = Long Slippery Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/c617f21664b092c640dddfe195c23d4c851a1b68.png) **Absorption Potion**
- Increased Health Absorption. - Awkward Potion + Gold Ingot = Absorption Potion - Absorption Potion + Redstone Ingot = Long Absorption Potion - Absorption Potion + Glowstone Ingot = Strong Absorption Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/1601fabf9c69635d1043acb4a182559b7335dc60.png) **Protection Potion**
- Increased Armor Protection. - Awkward Potion + Scute = Protection Potion - Protection Potion + Redstone Dust = Strong Protection Potion - Protection Potion + Glowstone Dust = Long Protection Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/825fae1a0ce8dfd8896c9785e697adedcbaaa5f8.png) **Health Boost Potion**
- Increased Health. - Absorption Potion + Blaze Powder = Health Boost Potion - Long Absorption Potion + Blaze Powder = Long Health Boost Potion - Strong Absorption Potion + Blaze Powder = Strong Health Boost Potion - Absorption Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Health Boost Potion - Absorption Potion + Glowstone Dust = Strong Health Boost Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/e76e7e23e623cde2cd4cf1de92228709f41d088a.png) **Glowing Potion**
- Glowing outline. - Awkward Potion + Glowstone Dust = Glowing Potion - Glowing Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Glowing Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/629f4a72c67f9f0ebaf282abd9395d017238b8db.png) **Saturation Potion**
- Fills Saturation/Hunger Bar. - Thick Potion + Golden Carrot = Saturation Potion - Saturation Potion + Glowstone Dust = Strong Saturation Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/34e63e4f6f0fed2ad90d6688d03d40fca80e4629.png) **Hunger Potion**
- Drains Saturation/Hunger Bar. - Saturation Potion + Fermented Spider Eye = Hunger Potion - Hunger Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Hunger Potion - Hunger Potion + Glowstone = Strong Hunger Potion - Strong Saturation Potion + Fermented Spider Eye = Strong Hunger Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/888f3a06459c51ab3a7290d7a4d78a1435f686b3.png) **Confusion Potion**
- Nausea Effect. - Awkward Potion + Warped Fungus = Confusion Potion - Confusion Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Confusion Potion - Confusion Potion + Glowstone Dust = Strong Confusion Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/b56ae0d819238ae6bbab32b30adde761c5349733.png) **Mining Fatigue Potion**
- Mining Speed Slowdown - Awkward Potion + Crimson Fungus = Mining Fatigue Potion - Mining Fatigue + Redstone Dust = Long Mining Fatigue Potion - Mining Fatigue + Glowstone Dust = Long Mining Fatigue Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/bfd9ef6748d517e10f3f0a0e37bd183a65196274.png) **Haste Potion**
- Mining Speed Increase - Mining Fatigue Potion + Crimson Fungus = Haste Potion - Long Mining Fatigue Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Haste Potion - Haste Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Haste Potion - Strong Mining Fatigue Potion + Crimson Fungus = Strong Haste Potion - Haste Potion + Glowstone Dust = Strong Haste Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/0ed7a51b9037dc80f9924ad2629f7a7484e1a1cc.png) **Fatal Poison Potion**
- Poison that can fully kill. - Poison Potion + Crimson Fungus = Fatal Poison Potion - Long Poison Potion + Crimson Fungus = Long Fatal Poison Potion - Strong Poison Potion + Crimson Fungus = Strong Fatal Poison Potion - Fatal Poison Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Fatal Poison Potion - Fatal Poison Potionn + Glowstone Dust = Strong Fatal Poison Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/a68413702782de90adc90376c9f9a2340cbacbe2.png) **Silence Potion**
- Negates player footsteps - Prevents Warden from hearing you(can still smell you if you stand too close) - Awkward Potion + (Any Color Wool) = Silence Potion - Silence Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Silence Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/19e93e0ff0fb2d60d4941ab93b4b2cfa1290fef0.png) **Nullifier Potion**
- Negates all potion effects other than itself - Protects against all effects for the Duration - Mundane Potion + Milk Bucket = Nullifier Potion - Nullifier Potion + Redstone = Long Nullifier Potion
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5UdtzIKo/images/5ba2aaf022c1a6f91c53dd025d403b7586b8b987.png) **Infection Potion**
- Slowly adds blindness, nausea, hunger - At the end of the potion it does 20 hearts of damage if you have 21+hearts or remove the effect you will survive - Converts Mobs/Players to Zombies on death - Players/Mobs are contagious and can be spread through attacks - Contagious after Zombification - Strong Hunger Potion + Rotten Flesh = Infection Potion - Infection Potion + Redstone Dust = Long Infection Potion
## My Other Mods: **Mystic Potions:** Adds 69 Potions & 19 New Potion Effects! **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mystic-potions) - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/mysticpotions)** **Projectiles:** New Arrows - Dynamite **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projectiles) - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/projectiles)** **Inspire:** Mystic Potions, Projectiles are both moving into this mod as well as all of my other ideas. Inspire was inspired by alot of other mods and peoples ideas and I want it to give some Inspiration to make new things, or Explore, or craft, or mine... Its just me though so these will take time.
